rules.description: PO Review Stories with all subtasks Done → BA Analysis
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Story') AND status in ('PO Review')

rules.description: BA Analysis Stories → generate Acceptance Criteria
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Story') AND status in ('BA Analysis')

rules.description: Solution Architecture Stories → generate Solution Design
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Story') AND status in ('Solution Architecture')

rules.description: Subtasks with 'q' label → trigger PO refinement
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Subtask') AND labels in ('q') and status not in (Done)

rules.description: Backlog / To Do Stories → ask clarification questions
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Story') AND status in ('Backlog', 'To Do')

rules.description: Backlog / To Do Tasks (children of parent ticket) → run intake agent
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Task') AND status in ('Backlog', 'To Do') AND parent = {parentTicket}

rules.description: Ready For Development Stories → trigger story_development
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Story') AND status in ('Ready For Development')

rules.description: Failed Test Cases with linked Bugs → recover Bug To Fix
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Test Case') AND status in ('Failed') ORDER BY updated ASC

rules.description: Failed Test Cases → create or link bugs in batch
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Test Case') AND status in ('Failed') AND (labels is EMPTY OR labels NOT IN ('sm_bug_creation_triggered')) ORDER BY created ASC

rules.description: Backlog / To Do / Ready For Development / In Development Bugs → trigger bug_development
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Bug') AND status in ('Backlog', 'To Do', 'Ready For Development', 'In Development', 'In Progress') AND updated <= -15m ORDER BY updated ASC

rules.description: Review/Rework/Blocked Stories & Bugs with already merged PR → recover Merged status
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Story', 'Bug') AND status in ('In Review', 'In Rework', 'Blocked') ORDER BY updated ASC

rules.description: Blocked Stories & Bugs with all resolved dependencies → move to Backlog
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Story', 'Bug') AND status in ('Blocked') ORDER BY updated ASC

rules.description: In Review Stories & Bugs → trigger pr_review
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Story', 'Bug') AND status in ('In Review') AND (labels is EMPTY OR labels NOT IN ('pr_approved'))

rules.description: In Review Stories & Bugs (pr_approved) → retry merge
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Story', 'Bug') AND status in ('In Review') AND labels = 'pr_approved' ORDER BY created ASC

rules.description: In Review Test Cases (pr_approved) → retry merge
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Test Case') AND status in ('In Review - Passed', 'In Review - Failed') AND labels = 'pr_approved' ORDER BY created ASC

rules.description: In Testing Stories (pr_approved) → merge test automation PR
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Story') AND status in ('In Testing') AND labels = 'pr_approved' ORDER BY created ASC

rules.description: In Testing Bugs (pr_approved) → merge test automation PR
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Bug') AND status in ('In Testing') AND labels = 'pr_approved' ORDER BY created ASC

rules.description: In Rework Stories & Bugs → trigger pr_rework
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Story', 'Bug') AND status in ('In Rework')

rules.description: Merged Stories → Ready For Testing + generate test cases
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Story') AND status in ('Merged')

rules.description: Merged Bugs → Ready For Testing
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Bug') AND status in ('Merged')

rules.description: Ready For Testing Bugs → generate test cases
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Bug') AND status in ('Ready For Testing')

rules.description: Ready For Testing Bugs → automate linked test cases in bulk
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Bug') AND status in ('Ready For Testing')

rules.description: Ready For Testing Stories → automate linked test cases in bulk
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Story') AND status in ('Ready For Testing')

rules.description: In Testing Stories → check all TCs passed → Done
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Story') AND status in ('In Testing')

rules.description: In Testing Bugs → check all TCs passed → Done
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Bug') AND status in ('In Testing')

rules.description: Intake/In Development Tasks → all linked Stories/Bugs Done → Ready For Testing
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Task') AND status in ('In Development', 'In Progress') AND (parent = {parentTicket} OR labels in ('ai_intake'))

rules.description: Stuck In Development Test Cases → recover (check PR, route to Rework/Review/Backlog)
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Test Case') AND status in ('In Development') AND updated <= -15m

rules.description: In Rework Test Cases → trigger pr_test_automation_rework
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Test Case') AND status in ('In Rework')

rules.description: In Review Test Cases → trigger pr_test_automation_review
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Test Case') AND status in ('In Review - Passed', 'In Review - Failed') AND (labels is EMPTY OR labels NOT IN ('pr_approved'))

rules.description: Failed Test Cases → create or link bug (single, disabled by default — use bulk_bugs_creation instead)
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Test Case') AND status in ('Failed')

rules.description: Backlog / To Do / Ready For Development Test Cases → In Development + automate
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Test Case') AND status in ('Backlog', 'To Do', 'Ready For Development')

rules.description: Bug To Fix Tickets → all linked Bugs Done → move to Backlog / Ready For Testing
rules.jql: project = {jiraProject} AND issuetype in ('Test Case', 'Story') AND status in ('Bug To Fix')
